Bash(node -e "try{const D=require\('./server/node_modules/better-sqlite3'\);const db=new D\('/tmp/mc_head.db',{readonly:true}\);const u=db.prepare\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM players'\).get\(\);const sample=db.prepare\('SELECT username,email,password_hash FROM players LIMIT 3'\).all\(\);console.log\('USERS in committed DB:',u.c\);console.log\('SAMPLE:',JSON.stringify\(sample,null,0\).slice\(0,400\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e "try{const D=require\('./server/node_modules/better-sqlite3'\);const db=new D\('./server/_tmp_head.db',{readonly:true}\);const u=db.prepare\('SELECT count\(*\) c FROM players'\).get\(\);const s=db.prepare\('SELECT username,substr\(email,1,12\) e,substr\(password_hash,1,10\) h FROM players LIMIT 4'\).all\(\);console.log\('USERS in HEAD-committed DB:',u.c\);console.log\('SAMPLE:',JSON.stringify\(s\)\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('err',e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e "const {duelOdds,effectiveBonus}=require\('./server/duel'\); const pct=o=>\({w:Math.round\(o.win*100\),t:Math.round\(o.tie*100\),l:Math.round\(o.lose*100\)}\); console.log\('R+4 vs Q+5:',JSON.stringify\(pct\(duelOdds\(4,5\)\)\)\); console.log\('Rei atacante\(5\) vs Rei defensor\(3\):',JSON.stringify\(pct\(duelOdds\(5,3\)\)\)\); console.log\('SD Rei\(0\) vs Rei\(0\):',JSON.stringify\(pct\(duelOdds\(0,0\)\)\)\);")
